mapper.select: SELECT `入库单编号`, `入库单号`, `总磅单号`, `收运运输单号`, `入库时间`, `仓管员编码`, `审核时间`, `审核人编码`, `入库备注`, `状态`, `是否锁定`, `锁定时间`, `锁定人编码`, `锁定原因`, `创建时间`, `更新时间` FROM WAREHOUSING WHERE `入库单号` = #{warehousingNo}
SELECT `入库单编号`, `入库单号`, `总磅单号`, `收运运输单号`, `入库时间`, `仓管员编码`, `审核时间`, `审核人编码`, `入库备注`, `状态`, `是否锁定`, `锁定时间`, `锁定人编码`, `锁定原因`, `创建时间`, `更新时间` FROM WAREHOUSING WHERE `入库单编号` = #{warehousingId}
SELECT MAX(入库单号) FROM WAREHOUSING WHERE 入库单号 LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')

SELECT w.`入库单编号` AS warehousing_id, w.`入库单号` AS warehousing_no, w.`总磅单号` AS weighing_slip_no, COALESCE( (SELECT do2.`运输单号` FROM WEIGHING_SLIP ws2 LEFT JOIN WEIGHING_SLIP_DISPATCH wsd2 ON ws2.`总磅单编号` = wsd2.`总磅单编号` LEFT JOIN DISPATCH_ORDER do2 ON wsd2.`运输单号` = do2.`运输单号` WHERE ws2.`总磅单号` = w.`总磅单号` LIMIT 1), w.`收运运输单号` ) AS dispatch_code, c.`合同号` AS contract_code, cu.`企业名称` AS customer_name, (SELECT wwi2.`废物名称` FROM WAREHOUSING_WASTE_ITEM wwi2 WHERE wwi2.`入库单编号` = w.`入库单编号` ORDER BY wwi2.`入库危废明细编号` LIMIT 1) AS waste_name, (SELECT wwi2.`废物代码` FROM WAREHOUSING_WASTE_ITEM wwi2 WHERE wwi2.`入库单编号` = w.`入库单编号` ORDER BY wwi2.`入库危废明细编号` LIMIT 1) AS waste_code, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM WAREHOUSING_WASTE_ITEM wwi3 WHERE wwi3.`入库单编号` = w.`入库单编号` AND wwi3.`实际收运数量` IS NOT NULL AND wwi3.`计划收运数量` IS NOT NULL AND ABS(wwi3.`实际收运数量` - wwi3.`计划收运数量`) / NULLIF(wwi3.`计划收运数量`, 0) > 0.1 ) THEN '有' ELSE '无' END AS has_major_difference, '' AS handler_opinion, '' AS disposal_method, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(wwi4.`实际收运数量`) FROM WAREHOUSING_WASTE_ITEM wwi4 WHERE wwi4.`入库单编号` = w.`入库单编号` ), 0) AS accepted_qty, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(wwi5.`差异原因` SEPARATOR '; ') FROM WAREHOUSING_WASTE_ITEM wwi5 WHERE wwi5.`入库单编号` = w.`入库单编号` AND wwi5.`差异原因` IS NOT NULL AND wwi5.`差异原因` != '') AS difference_reason, DATE_FORMAT(w.`入库时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS warehousing_time, w.`仓管员编码` AS warehouse_keeper_id, e1.`员工姓名` AS warehouse_keeper_name, DATE_FORMAT(w.`审核时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS audit_time, w.`审核人编码` AS auditor_id, e2.`员工姓名` AS auditor_name, w.`仓管员编码` AS creator_id, e3.`员工姓名` AS creator_name, w.`状态` AS status, DATE_FORMAT(w.`创建时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_time, DATE_FORMAT(w.`更新时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS update_time, w.`是否锁定` AS locked, w.`入库备注` AS remark FROM WAREHOUSING w LEFT JOIN DISPATCH_ORDER do ON w.`收运运输单号` = do.`运输单号` LEFT JOIN PICKUP_NOTICE pn ON do.`收运通知单号` = pn.`收运通知单号` LEFT JOIN CONTRACT c ON pn.`合同号` = c.`合同号` LEFT JOIN CUSTOMER cu ON pn.`客户编码` = cu.`客户编码` LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e1 ON w.`仓管员编码` = e1.`员工编码` LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e2 ON w.`审核人编码` = e2.`员工编码` LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e3 ON w.`仓管员编码` = e3.`员工编码`
AND ( w.`入库单号` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR w.`总磅单号` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR w.`收运运输单号` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND w.`总磅单号` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{weighingSlipNo}, '%')
AND w.`收运运输单号` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dispatchCode}, '%')
AND w.`状态` = #{status}
AND w.`入库时间` >= #{startTime}
AND w.`入库时间` <= #{endTime}
AND w.`仓管员编码` = #{creatorFilter}
AND c.`合同号` IS NULL
ORDER BY
w.`入库单编号` w.`总磅单号` w.`运输单号` w.`合同号` w.`客户名称` wi.`废物名称` wi.`废物代码` w.`是否存在重大差异` w.`处理意见` w.`处置方式` w.`接受量` w.`差异说明` w.`入库时间` w.`仓管员` w.`审核时间` w.`审核人`
CASE WHEN w.`是否锁定` = 1 THEN '已锁定' WHEN w.`审核时间` IS NULL THEN '待结算' ELSE '已结算' END
w.`备注` w.`创建时间` w.`更新时间` w.`创建时间`
ASC DESC
w.`创建时间` DESC
SELECT DISTINCT w.`入库单号` FROM WAREHOUSING w INNER JOIN SETTLEMENT_REFERENCE sr ON w.`入库单编号` = sr.`关联单号` WHERE sr.`结算单编号` = #{settlementId} AND sr.`关联类型` = 'WAREHOUSING' ORDER BY w.`入库单号`
mapper.update: UPDATE WAREHOUSING SET `状态` = #{status}, `更新时间` = NOW() WHERE `入库单编号` = #{warehousingId}

UPDATE WAREHOUSING SET `状态` = #{status}, `更新时间` = NOW() WHERE `入库单编号` IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT `状态` as status, COUNT(*) as count FROM WAREHOUSING GROUP BY `状态` ORDER BY `状态`

SELECT w.`入库单编号` AS warehousing_id, w.`入库单号` AS warehousing_no, w.`总磅单号` AS weighing_slip_no, COALESCE( (SELECT do2.`运输单号` FROM WEIGHING_SLIP ws2 LEFT JOIN WEIGHING_SLIP_DISPATCH wsd2 ON ws2.`总磅单编号` = wsd2.`总磅单编号` LEFT JOIN DISPATCH_ORDER do2 ON wsd2.`运输单号` = do2.`运输单号` WHERE ws2.`总磅单号` = w.`总磅单号` LIMIT 1), w.`收运运输单号` ) AS dispatch_code, c.`合同号` AS contract_code, cu.`企业名称` AS customer_name, DATE_FORMAT(w.`入库时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS warehousing_time, w.`仓管员编码` AS warehouse_keeper_id, e1.`员工姓名` AS warehouse_keeper_name, DATE_FORMAT(w.`审核时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS audit_time, w.`审核人编码` AS auditor_id, e2.`员工姓名` AS auditor_name, w.`入库备注` AS remark, CASE WHEN w.`是否锁定` = 1 THEN '已锁定' WHEN w.`审核时间` IS NULL THEN '待结算' ELSE '已结算' END AS status, w.`是否锁定` AS locked, DATE_FORMAT(w.`锁定时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lock_time, w.`锁定人编码` AS lock_user_id, w.`锁定原因` AS lock_reason, DATE_FORMAT(w.`创建时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_time, DATE_FORMAT(w.`更新时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS update_time,
-- 入库单危废明细信息 wwi.`入库危废明细编号` AS item_id, wwi.`收运通知单明细编号` AS pickup_notice_item_id, wwi.`危废条目编号` AS hazardous_waste_item_id, hwc.`废物类别` AS waste_category, wwi.`废物名称` AS waste_name, wwi.`废物代码` AS waste_code, wwi.`废物形态` AS form, wwi.`危险特性` AS hazard_feature, wwi.`计划收运数量` AS planned_qty, wwi.`基本计量单位` AS measure_unit, wwi.`是否启用辅助核算` AS enable_auxiliary_accounting, wwi.`辅助计量单位` AS aux_unit, wwi.`辅助单位每基础单位数量` AS aux_per_base, wwi.`辅助数量` AS aux_quantity, wwi.`实际收运辅助数量` AS actual_aux_quantity, wwi.`实际收运数量` AS actual_qty, DATE_FORMAT(wwi.`实际入库日期`, '%Y-%m-%d') AS actual_warehousing_date, DATE_FORMAT(wwi.`更新时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS update_time, wwi.`差异原因` AS difference_reason
FROM WAREHOUSING w LEFT JOIN DISPATCH_ORDER do ON w.`收运运输单号` = do.`运输单号` LEFT JOIN PICKUP_NOTICE pn ON do.`收运通知单号` = pn.`收运通知单号` LEFT JOIN CONTRACT c ON pn.`合同号` = c.`合同号` LEFT JOIN CUSTOMER cu ON pn.`客户编码` = cu.`客户编码` LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e1 ON w.`仓管员编码` = e1.`员工编码` LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e2 ON w.`审核人编码` = e2.`员工编码` LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSING_WASTE_ITEM wwi ON w.`入库单编号` = wwi.`入库单编号` LEFT JOIN HAZARDOUS_WASTE_ITEM hwi ON wwi.`危废条目编号` = hwi.`条目编号` LEFT JOIN HAZARDOUS_WASTE_CATEGORY hwc ON hwi.`废物类别编号` = hwc.`废物类别编号`
WHERE w.`入库单编号` IN
#{warehousingId}
ORDER BY w.`入库单编号` ASC, wwi.`入库危废明细编号` ASC
SELECT DISTINCT w.`入库单编号` FROM WAREHOUSING w WHERE w.`审核时间` IS NOT NULL AND w.`审核时间` >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) ORDER BY w.`审核时间` DESC LIMIT 200
mapper.update:
UPDATE WAREHOUSING SET `状态` = '待结算', `更新时间` = NOW() WHERE `入库单号` IN
#{code}
mapper.select:
SELECT w.`入库单编号` AS warehousingId, w.`入库单号` AS warehousingCode, DATE_FORMAT(w.`入库时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS warehousingTime, w.`仓管员编码` AS warehouseKeeperId, e.`员工姓名` AS warehouseKeeperName, w.`入库备注` AS remark, w.`总磅单号` AS weighingSlipNo, d.`运输单号` AS dispatchCode, pn.`收运通知单号` AS pickupNoticeCode, c.`企业名称` AS customerName, (SELECT SUM(wi.`实际收运数量`) FROM WAREHOUSING_WASTE_ITEM wi WHERE wi.`入库单编号` = w.`入库单编号`) AS totalWeight, w.`状态` AS status, CASE WHEN w.`状态` = '已结算' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS settled, sr.`结算单编号` AS settlementId, s.`结算单单号` AS settlementCode FROM WAREHOUSING w LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON w.`仓管员编码` = e.`员工编码` LEFT JOIN DISPATCH_ORDER d ON w.`收运运输单号` = d.`运输单号` LEFT JOIN PICKUP_NOTICE pn ON d.`收运通知单号` = pn.`收运通知单号` LEFT JOIN CUSTOMER c ON pn.`客户编码` = c.`客户编码`
LEFT JOIN SETTLEMENT_REFERENCE sr ON sr.`关联来源类型` = 'warehousing' AND sr.`关联来源单号` = w.`入库单号` LEFT JOIN SETTLEMENT s ON sr.`结算单编号` = s.`结算单编号` WHERE pn.`合同号` = #{contractCode} ORDER BY w.`入库时间` DESC, w.`入库单编号` DESC
